creator: nxjoseph@protonmail.com
text:
pc speakers that i had ordered did arrive just now, i tested the `vt` bell and it works. I didn't apply the patch that changes the bell pitch.

i had to set "kern.vt.enable_bell=1" in /boot/loader.conf. Strangely the `vt` bell doesn't work when "speaker_load=YES" is set in /boot/loader.conf.

I didn't test new commit yet: vt: Fix frequency calcuation for bell
2416be588ea113cc06b924ed85861ed3bc391fe0

I am on 14.1-RELEASE, As far as i can see, the commit changes only one line in sys/dev/vt/vt_core.c.

So I think i can patch the src code and see the new change.
